converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
William Roy Kellough papers
Kellough, William Roy, 1923-
3521
3.1 cubic feet. 3.1 cubic feet.
1979-1985. Reports, lectures and speeches, articles, pamphlets and books, correspondence, and other papers. Reports, lectures and speeches, articles, pamphlets and books concerning Kellough's career as a land economist. Collection material in English 2074780
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Martin Heggestad
Date completed:
July 2004
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, July 2004
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, August 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
W. R.Kellough became a member of the Ely Chapter of Lambda Alpha International in 1965, one of three of the first members from outside the continental United States. In 1967, he formed the first International chapter in Toronto Canada, the Simcoe Chapter, and was its first president. He was editor of the Land Economics Journal for a number of years and was International President for 1982-1983. He heads W.R. Kellough & Associates (Canada) Inc., appraisers and business and real estate economists.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Reports, lectures and speeches, articles, pamphlets and books concerning city and regional planning, real estate valuation, and other aspects of real estate development and land use; includes material concerning several areas of Ontario, Canada. Also includes miscellaneous papers and correspondence of Lambda Alpha, 1971-1982 (3 v.); correspondence and articles for preparation of the Land Economics Journal (2 v.); minutes and correspondence of the Simcoe chapter (1 v.); correspondence and data on the Comparative Study of the U.S. and Canadian Cities (1 v.); curricula vitae of new members and correspondence relating to the formation of the St. Louis, Phoenix, and Oklahoma Chapters; correspondence and other material of the International President, 1982-1983, and one volume of committee records for that period; and Lambda Alpha International Donors and Archives Content Cornell University Archives, a guide to the collections, compiled by Kellough.
RELATED MATERIALS
Part of Lambda Alpha Literary Archives.
Access Restrictions:
Access to reports restricted for two years from receipt of same by the department.
Cite As:
William Roy Kellough papers, #3521. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Résumés (Employment). Land economics. Regional planning -- Canada. Regional planning. Real property -- Valuation. Real property surveys. Real estate development. Land use -- Planning. City planning -- Ontario. City planning. Lambda Alpha International. Simcoe Chapter Lambda Alpha International. Oklahoma Chapter Lambda Alpha International. Phoenix Chapter Lambda Alpha International. St. Louis Chapter
